name: Native Code Index (tree-sitter)
description: Integrate a native Rust tree-sitter code indexer into the Tide backend. Parses workspace files into symbols (functions, classes, methods), stores in SQLite, auto-indexes on workspace open with file watcher for incremental updates, and exposes symbol retrieval tools to the Pi agent for ~99% token reduction when navigating codebases. Inspired by jCodeMunch MCP.
notes: Uses tree-sitter Rust crate directly — no Python/MCP wrapping.
Index stored in .tide/index.db (separate from tide.db to avoid lock contention).
Initial languages: TypeScript, TSX, JavaScript, JSX, Rust, Python, Go.
Auto-indexes on workspace open via background tokio task.
File watcher (notify crate) provides incremental updates on save.
Pi extension (tide-index.ts) exposes 5 tools for symbol retrieval via better-sqlite3.
Stable symbol IDs follow jCodeMunch format: {rel_path}::{qualified_name}#{kind}.
FTS5 virtual table enables fast fuzzy symbol search.
ignore crate auto-respects .gitignore for file walking.

tasks.title: Add tree-sitter + SQLite crates to Cargo.toml
tasks.description: Add dependencies: tree-sitter, tree-sitter-typescript, tree-sitter-rust, tree-sitter-python, tree-sitter-go, tree-sitter-javascript, rusqlite (bundled), notify, xxhash-rust, ignore.

tasks.title: Create indexer module with SQLite schema
tasks.description: New module apps/desktop/src-tauri/src/indexer/ with mod.rs and schema.rs. Creates repos, files, symbols tables plus symbols_fts FTS5 virtual table in .tide/index.db. Triggers keep FTS in sync. WAL mode for concurrent reads.

tasks.title: Implement tree-sitter parsers for 5 languages
tasks.description: parser.rs maps file extensions to tree-sitter Languages. symbols.rs extracts symbols per language: TS/JS (functions, classes, methods, interfaces, types, enums, arrow functions, constants), Rust (functions, structs, enums, traits, impls, consts, types, modules), Python (functions, classes, methods with docstrings), Go (functions, methods, types, constants).

tasks.title: Build workspace indexing pipeline
tasks.description: Uses ignore crate to walk workspace (auto-respects .gitignore). xxh3 hash per file for incremental updates — only re-parses changed files. Emits index_progress Tauri events. Runs as background tokio::spawn task.

tasks.title: Implement file watcher for incremental updates
tasks.description: notify::RecommendedWatcher on workspace root. Debounced event processing (300ms). Re-indexes on file change/create, removes on delete. Filters to supported extensions only.

tasks.title: Implement query functions for symbol retrieval
tasks.description: query.rs with: get_file_tree, get_file_outline (hierarchical), get_symbol (reads source from disk for body), search_symbols (FTS5), get_repo_outline.

tasks.title: Register Tauri IPC commands for indexer
tasks.description: Tauri commands: index_workspace_cmd, index_file_tree, index_file_outline, index_get_symbol, index_search_symbols, index_repo_outline, index_status, index_invalidate. All registered in lib.rs invoke_handler. open_workspace auto-triggers background indexing.

tasks.title: Create tide-index.ts Pi extension
tasks.description: Pi extension with 5 tools: tide_index_file_tree, tide_index_file_outline, tide_index_get_symbol, tide_index_search, tide_index_repo_outline. Reads from .tide/index.db via better-sqlite3. before_agent_start hook injects system prompt about available tools when index is ready.

tasks.title: Add frontend IPC bindings and indexStore
tasks.description: IPC wrappers in lib/ipc.ts for all index commands. Zustand indexStore tracking indexed/indexing/fileCount/symbolCount/progress. App.tsx listens to index_progress and index_complete Tauri events.

tasks.title: Context Dial index indicator
tasks.description: Enhance ContextDial.tsx to show 'IDX' badge when indexed, tooltip with file/symbol counts. CostIndicator popover shows estimated token savings.

tasks.title: Router enhancement with index awareness
tasks.description: In tide-router.ts, use index stats to refine task classification: large workspaces with cross-codebase prompts bump to complex tier. Small workspaces (<10 files) have reduced complexity thresholds.
